programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep111: Shark Nation
programme.desc: There's no doubt sharks have an image problem. And they're certainly in trouble globally. The population of some species has declined by more than 90% due to over fishing. But there's still one place in the world where sharks thrive – the Bahamas. Sharks not only prosper there, they are highly protected. It’s illegal to kill them.

programme.title: Wash'Dup
programme.desc: Based on a true story, this mockumentary film will follow a group of ex- snowboard filmmakers and ex-pro riders who never hung it up. Still in love with the sport and fueled by mid life crisis, these shred for lifers are extremely vulnerable to delusions of grandeur. But the dream is always “still alive” in their minds. In turn they ignore all the red flags and continue to do what seems completely irrational to everyone except for them. After a 16 year hiatus, they irresponsibly put their adult obligations behind, and join a pact to make just one last movie. But they are missing a solid presence of youth to make their movie marketable. As a remedy they end up filming with riders that span 2 generations. This unlikely alliance leads them to discover much more about snowboarding and themselves by living the snowboarding dream through an ageless lens. Filled with sketch comedy skits, this film expresses the nuanced story of a young sport reaching a level of maturity the current industry now begins to embrace. From the death of the snowboard shop, and extinction of film media, to the old pro struggling to find their way in life after the glory days are long gone, WashDup is a story that finally needs to be told.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Elena Hight - Dose 01
programme.desc: Elena Hight is one of the most accomplished women in snowboarding history. Interestingly, her passion for boardsports culture originated in her home state of Hawaii on the island of Kauai. This is where Elena’s Microdose series begins. Featuring Jamie Anderson, Papa Mike, Chris Owen, Louie Vito.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Elena Hight - Dose 02
programme.desc: From the moment she strapped into a snowboard, Elena Hight has been an innovative and visionary force in women’s snowboarding. In Episode 2 of her Microdose series, we take a look at two of Elena’s greatest achievements. Featuring Jamie Anderson, Scotty Lago and Louie Vito.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Back Yard Boogie
programme.desc: Terje Haakonsen rips his back yard on the snow-skate and Rip Zinger...well, yeah he gets creative too.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Torstein Horgmo - Dose 01
programme.desc: Bullying has long term and far too often, fatal effects. Torstein Horgmo is considered to be one of the top five snowboarders to ever strap in and snowboarding quite literally saved his life. Here is where his Microdose story begins.

programme.title: Fight Stars

programme.desc: In this last episode of the season, we visit Zagreb, the capital of the country and one of the most popular destinations in Croatia. As a city with a rich history and an abundance of cultural events, it is the perfect place to include at the end of our Croatian adventure. Let's check it out!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 1
programme.desc: Hello Sailors! It’s such a great pleasure to welcome you to the new season of Sail-ho Croatia. We’re setting off on yet another incredible journey sailing the Adriatic starting from the lush and picturesque Neretva valley and the town of Ploče. Stay tuned and enjoy the ride!

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 1
programme.desc: The GC32 Racing Tour is back! The World Sailing foiling catamaran circuit has returned as the world recovers from COVID, and both teams and organizers have been keen to return to racing onboard their state-of-the-art flying catamarans. After 18 months of no racing and cancelled events, the anticipation going into the first event in Lagos, Portugal is huge!After a highly competitive, spectacular 2019 season the GC32 foiling cats are back on the racecourse. In 2021, the ultra-high performance one-design catamarans will visit 3 top venues for 4 events, each location selected specially to provide conditions ideal for the nimble GC32s to fly across the water at 30+ knot speeds.So, let’s travel to Lagos, in southern Portugal's Algarve region to witness the first GC32 Racing Tour event for 2021, Lagos Cup 1.

programme.title: Nastro Rosa Tour - Review
programme.desc: A sports format, innovative and spectacular. An international tour along the mediterranean coasts and lighthouses of the Mediterranean sea.A series of multi-disciplinary sailing events, in an exclusive Italian concept consisting of stages that will touch some of the most beautiful Italian and Mediterranean coastal resorts.

programme.title: Inside Sailing - Episode 1
programme.desc: Welcome to the first episode of Inside Sailing 2019! Our journey starts in the United States with the PANERAI Classic Yachts Challenge. Then we head east to visit Asia for two unique sailing events - The FAREAST 28R World Championship and the Optimist Asian and Oceanian Championship.Finally, we get the chance to experience sailing in Greece's crystal clear waters with the popular Catamaran's Cup.

programme.title: America's Cup Insight - Episode 5
programme.desc: Emirates Team New Zealand take Bermuda by storm as Peter Burling knocks out James Spithill in the first four races. Now, it's an uphill battle for Oracle Team USA at the 35th America's Cup. On the tech specs, we unveil the secrets of speed and why Team New Zealand has delivered a better overall package on their powerful AC50 'Aoateroa'. Watch the full recap of the AC35 kickoff.

programme.title: The Kayak Man
programme.desc: Another expedition? You must be crazy.This is what Beppe's friend told him when he decided to leave for North America. Even after paddling in the biggest rivers in the world, his desire for adventure was still not satisfied, and he went out looking for more. Dreaming of freedom, sleeping bags and nature, he ventured into the unknown to discover the Yukon and Teslin Rivers.For those unaware, the Yukon river is the major watercourse of the northwest of North America. It flows through the Canadian Yukon Territory and makes it's way to Alaska. The Teslin River is a bit shorter, but not for this reason less fun to dive into. They both offer an impressive scenery amidst cold temperatures, dangerous whitewaters and the wild nature of North America.The Kayak Man takes us on a journey of self discovery through the most beautiful landscapes of Canada and the United States while following the path of a brave kayaker that leaves his life behind in an attempt to explore new horizons by himself. An impressive trip that will not leave him the same way he was before.

programme.title: La Transat AG2R La Mondiale - Episode 1 - Depart
programme.desc: Every two years, the city of Concarneau in southern Finistère hosts the start of the Transat AG2R La Mondiale: the double-handed transatlantic on identical boats, founded over 25 years ago. This time, 15 boats line up on the quay of Carnot to make legend in this incredible competition. Let's dive into the action in France!

programme.title: PRADA Cup - Round Robin 3 Week 2
programme.desc: The Round Robin competition continues as teams face each other in 4 rounds to determine who will advance to the final and who will have to compete in a semi-final before heading to the final of the Prada Cup.Get ready to see INEOS Team UK, NYYC American Magic and Luna Rossa Prada Pirelli compete ferociously in one of the top competitions of sailing.

programme.title: Dropped - S07:E02 - Game Plan
programme.desc: With base camp set up and the cold setting in, Chris and Casey must find food…fast. Their energy levels are depleting as they begin their hunt for moose. As time ticks on, the brothers must think on their feet to find food…or risk going hungry.

programme.title: Dropped - S07:E03 - Wind Burnt
programme.desc: Saskatchewan’s bitter cold and unforgiving wind makes for brutal days and nights for Chris and Casey. A rainstorm adds more difficulty and discomfort. Mentally drained and hungry, the brothers must try new tactics to find food and warmth.

programme.title: Dropped - S07:E04 - Brotherly Love
programme.desc: The lack of hunting opportunities have drained Chris and Casey’s patience. Arguments ensue when they disagree over staying put, or portaging to a new lake. Signs of a bear remind the brothers that they must remain focused in order to stay alive.

programme.title: Dropped - S07:E05 - Hunger Pains
programme.desc: Symptoms of starvation have set in for Chris and Casey, who haven’t eaten in days. When they cross paths with a grouse, the unexpected happens. Frustration peaks as the temperatures drop. The brothers set up a new camp, but will it help the hunt?

programme.title: Dropped - S07:E06 - White Out
programme.desc: With still no big game in sight, Chris and Casey are forced to rely on fishing for food. The cold temperatures have slowed down the fish, creating challenges. When Mother Nature brings a brutal snow storm, the brothers are tested likenever before.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Clara Inés talks on the phone with Cirilo. Raul inadvertently overhears when she mentions that her sister Bernice tried to commit suicide.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Anguished because the police have not been able to find Azalea and the girl, Adriana and César return to the Palacios house, where they discover that Carlos Raúl is waiting for them.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Adriana manages to take Tatianita away while Carlos Raul is left confronting the criminals to defend his mother.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Fernando threatens Jeli with taking the child, but Leandro warns him that he is his father. Fausto waits for his son Gregorio, beats him, throws him out of the house and decides to take all his belongings and benefits. Ezequiel chooses to lock up Julia; Gregorio comes to take his wife, Celso finds them, enraged and drugged, and attacks them, wounding the young woman.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Celso, unhinged, watches and mocks Fausto, who shoots at his lover's chest, who falls instantly. Fausto goes to his office, telling everyone that nothing happened. Camila, at the scene, tries to convince Patricia to flee because everything indicates that she is Celso's murderer.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: After remembering the moment in which Rosendo Zapata tried to get on top of her, Victoria Guanipa reveals to Nicolás Del Casal that, just like him, she also once dreamed of the same bull they have just encountered and that it was after that that she had an experience that made her feel in danger. Embarrassment invades Felipe Osuna again when he cannot respond sexually to his wife Antonieta as it has happened since they got married; the girl asks if it is because of this "problem" that he has been avoiding being alone with her; Felipe gets upset with the young woman for suggesting such a thing. Due to the heavy rain; Nicolás and Victoria find themselves in the need to take refuge in an abandoned shed in Cantarrana; place where the young Guanipa takes the opportunity to ask her beloved why he did not insist on reconciling with her and ended up marrying Florencia; he just tells her that it is too late to wonder why things happened and that there is no turning back.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: Victoria Guanipa and Nicolás Del Casal say goodbye with an embrace after spending the night together sheltering from a strong storm when they are surprised by Florencia de Del Casal, who complains to her husband about his closeness with Victoria. Genara demands Hilario Guanipa to tell her where his wife Adelaida is, because she knows that he took her by force from their house. Florencia asks her husband to tell her what happened between him and Victoria while they were sheltering from the rain; although he assures her that he did not betray her, he considers that the best thing for them is to separate; however, she is not willing to give him a divorce. Hilario is told that something happened with Carlos Hansen and immediately goes to the town hospital to find out what happened; Felipe tells him that they had a traffic accident and that his boss had to be transferred to the capital because his condition is very delicate. Hilario takes Adelaida to his house; there Felipe, in front of Victoria and Genara, informs the lady that Hansen had an accident; Adelaida fears a misfortune.

programme.title: CUATRO DECADAS
programme.desc: Programa musical que se centra en explorar y celebrar cuatro décadas de músic

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ante las intenciones de Ezequiel, Octavia y Marcelina agreden verbalmente a Camila. Max le propone y Camila duda pero accede a casarse con él. En una cena, Ezequiel reúne a sus hijos y Camila será la homenajeada especial.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: En la cena, el tema principal será Rosa Blanco. Ezequiel dice que esa mujer fue una oportunista que enamoró y se aprovechó de su hermano menor, Leoncio. Astrid ofende agregando que fue una prostituta, culpable de la guerra entre las dos familias por su relación con Augusto Aragón y también con Leoncio López.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila insiste en saber sobre su relación familiar, piensa que pueda ser prima de Max. Ezequiel quiere despejar la duda de que podría ser su sobrina, interroga a la Madre Isabel que niega saberlo y también recurre a Marcelina que se lo confirma. Camila, protege a Chantal, una niña que vende flores.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max y Camila en idílicos momentos sin importar ní el resultado del A.D.N. Continúan en la búsqueda de Rosa Blanco. Dos encomiendas entregadas por un mensajero, una para los López Méndez y otra para los Aragón, confirman la reaparición de El Doliente.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Al llegar a la casa de El Jagüey, Madre Isabel no los deja entrar, conocen a Henry y presumen que también pueda ser hijo de Rosa Blanco. Max piensa que algo grave

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel defiende a Camila de la acusación de Roberto y confronta a Camila. Max, al encontrarla muy triste, le pide que confíe en él. Julia y Gregorio con un plan para que sus padres piensen que no volverán a verse y dejen de seguirlos.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila se defiende fieramente de la agresión de Roberto y le cuenta a Max lo sucedido. La Madre Isabel, para ayudar a Camila, le confía a Ezequiel el motivo por el que Roberto la extorsiona. Max presiona a Camila para que le cuente toda la verdad.

programme.title: Utopía 7
programme.desc: En un mundo postapocalíptico, una pandilla de jóvenes rebeldes lucha contra los mecanismos de alta tecnología de un sistema informático definitivo que había sido encargado por un grupo de élite para restablecer el orden y el equilibrio.

programme.title: Expediente 53
programme.desc: Esta es una historia de misterio y acción en la ciudad de Bryan Texas el comandante Gatel pide la ayuda del FBI ya que hay muchos desaparecidos, y asesinatos en la ciudad. Los agentes Gutiérrez, Bracho y Miravalle del FBI le comentan al comandante Gatel que ellos sospechan que puede ser obra de una secta satánica y que el líder es un demonio de nombre Abal que está en el cuerpo de una bella mujer de nombre Lilly.

programme.title: 72 Horas Para Morir
programme.desc: Su madre lo dejo en manos de su padre siendo un niño y el lo preparo para ser un gatillero y hacerse cargo del territorio de Texas, por eso lo apodan el Texano. Un día en la calle se encuentra con una mujer y ella le adivina su futuro, le dice que tiene 72 horas para morir... el texano no lo cree pero algo muy malo esta por suceder.

programme.title: Fantasías
programme.desc: La historia de Brenda y Antonio, una pareja de clase media con dos hijos adolescentes y una vida sexual aburrida, en busca de nuevas experiencias, primero con su sexy sirvienta. Más tarde, siguiendo el consejo de Esther, una amiga mayor que tiene un estilo de vida swinger junto con su esposo, deciden explorar la posibilidad de despertar una nueva pasión al ligar con Miguel y Claudia, una pareja swinger. Pero luego llegan los problemas.

programme.title: Borrar de la Memoria
programme.desc: Una historia de amor se transforma en una historia de persecuciones y asesinatos sin esclarecer en el contexto de la masacre estudiantil de octubre de 1968. Más de 40 años después, un periodista tenaz se da a la tarea de aclarar los crímenes bajo condiciones muy peligrosas, con el objetivo de llevar la verdad ante la justicia. Ello representa un esfuerzo dedicado a obligar a un país a reconocer la negación de la reconciliación y el cierre de trágicos acontecimientos políticos y sociales en su historia.

programme.title: Amar
programme.desc: Carlos quiere pero Susana no. Joel no quiere pero Patricia lo obliga. Gabriel lo espera pero Martha no se lo da. Amado lo busca con una gringa y lo pierde. Benito lo tiene toda la vida. Concha se lo lleva más allá del sistema solar. Todos lo quieren y todos lo dan pero unos no lo reciben y otros quieren más. Así es Amar.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.
